problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: If Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) is applied to at, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
